daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but restless—like you're ready to shake things up. The universe is whispering that it's time to trust your gut over overthinking. Lean into that stubborn Taurus magic today.
daily.love: Someone's energy is shifting around you, and honestly? It feels intentional. Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is a moment to get real about what you actually want, not what looks good on paper.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. Don't sleep on that project or thought you've been sitting on—the stars are backing your creative momentum more than usual. Share it with someone who gets it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding rituals today. Think slow mornings, warm drinks, maybe some stretching. You don't need to push hard; gentle consistency is where your power lives right now.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy invites you to lean into your natural magnetism, Taurus. Mercury's gentle influence suggests authentic conversations flow easier—trust your instincts about what (and who) deserves your time and energy.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing your quiet confidence lately. Whether single or coupled, this is prime time for genuine connection. Skip the games and let your real self show up—vulnerability hits different when it's real.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving vibes are *immaculate* right now. Don't sleep on unconventional solutions to ongoing challenges. The universe is basically handing you permission to do things your own way this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not forced productivity. Honor what feels restorative—whether that's movement, stillness, or just unplugging. Energy management beats grinding, always.
